TEST.0.title: Codebusters 2026 Division B Regional Test # 7
TEST.0.customHeader:
Names of participants: (Please print neatly)

 
 
 
School Name:

Check your team:  ◻ Varsity     ◻ JV1     ◻ JV2     ◻ JV3

Warning: Do not open this packet until given permission to do so.

Note: There are useful notes after this page.

CIPHER.440.cipherString: A life spent making mistakes is not only more honorable, but more useful than a life spent doing nothing.
CIPHER.440.question: George Bernard Shaw has been heard to say the following phrase that has been encoded using the Aristocrat Cipher. What does it say?
CIPHER.440.author: George Bernard Shaw

CIPHER.422.cipherString: There is so little time. We need to make every moment count.
CIPHER.422.question: Someone left this coded message in the school lab. You are told it's a quote by Shannon Delany encoded with a Baconian. What does it say?
CIPHER.422.author: Shannon Delany

CIPHER.416.cipherString: You have become a team. And you're going to be drawing upon each other for the rest of your lives.
CIPHER.416.question: Your robot vacuum just projected this message onto the ceiling. It's a quote by Mark Milley encoded with an Aristocrat. What does it say?
CIPHER.416.author: Mark Milley

CIPHER.424.cipherString: Have the courage to take off your mask and be humbled.
CIPHER.424.question: Upon searching a room, the following were found on scraps of paper. You are told it's a quote by Ken Poirot encoded as a Fractionated Morse. You are told that the quote has OFFYO in it corresponding to the encoded text I N E R B D L J, meaning B = ●××; D = –●–; E = –●×; I = –––; J = ––×; L = –×–; N = ×●●; R = ●●–. What does it say?
CIPHER.424.author: Ken Poirot

CIPHER.420.cipherString: Sé que muchos artistas sienten que son unos impostores; eso forma parte del placer de la creatividad.
CIPHER.420.question: A coded message is discovered inside a fortune cookie. It turns out to be a quote by David Cronenberg in Spanish, encoded using a Xenocrypt Cipher using a K1 alphabet. You are told that the cipher contains UNOS. What does it say?
CIPHER.420.author: David Cronenberg
CIPHER.420.translation: I know that many artists feel that they are frauds - that's part of the pleasure of creativity.

CIPHER.426.question: A coded message appears after you shine a UV light on a classroom poster. It turns out to be a quote, encrypted using a Cryptarithm. What do the values 831 735904 2998356256 decode to?

CIPHER.418.cipherString: Nature is full of genius, full of the divinity so that not a snowflake escapes its fashioning hand.
CIPHER.418.question: Henry David Thoreau was often heard to say the following phrase which has been encoded as an Aristocrat using a K1 alphabet. You are told that the cipher contains NOT. What does it say?
CIPHER.418.author: Henry David Thoreau

CIPHER.425.cipherString: Life is too short. I don't have time to speak slowly.
CIPHER.425.question: A glitchy hologram in the school planetarium displays this Fractionated Morse version of Dev Anand's words. You are told that the quote has THAVET in it corresponding to the encoded text Z Y D R Q I A K, meaning A = ●××; D = ●●●; I = ●–×; K = –×●; Q = ×●●; R = ×●–; Y = ××●; Z = ××–. What does it say?
CIPHER.425.author: Dev Anand

CIPHER.432.cipherString: Experience converts us to ourselves when books fail us.
CIPHER.432.question: You intercept a mysterious radio signal. Decoding it reveals a quote by A. B. Alcott encrypted as a Nihilist Substitution with a keyword of PINCH and polybius key of FLAGSHIP. What does it say?
CIPHER.432.author: A. B. Alcott

CIPHER.428.cipherString: There is always room for improvement, always. Everything can be improved.
CIPHER.428.question: Archaeologists unearth a stone tablet inscribed with a message. It's a quote by Mapi León encoded as a Porta using a keyword of RUBY. What does it say?
CIPHER.428.author: Mapi León

CIPHER.421.cipherString: Experiment is an art, and demands an artist.
CIPHER.421.question: An explorer's journal mentions a “hidden truth” encoded below. It turns out to be a quote by Aristotle: a Chapter from the History of Science, written in a Baconian Cipher. You are told that the deciphered text starts with a single letter followed by XPER. What does it say?
CIPHER.421.author: Aristotle: a Chapter from the History of Science

CIPHER.436.cipherString: Knowledge is the food of the soul.
CIPHER.436.question: The message below was encoded into the DNA sequence of a synthetic organism. It translates to a quote by Plato, encrypted using an Affine Cipher with a=21 and b=23. What does it say?
CIPHER.436.author: Plato

CIPHER.433.cipherString: Technology is anything that wasn't around when you were born.
CIPHER.433.question: Frozen inside an ice core sample from Antarctica: this Nihilist Substitution message by Alan Kay with a keyword of OBJECT and polybius key of MICROBES. What does it say?
CIPHER.433.author: Alan Kay

CIPHER.429.cipherString: Learn how to be happy with what you have while you pursue all that you want.
CIPHER.429.question: Found inside a dissected frog's stomach (plastic, don’t worry): this Porta note by Jim Rohn using a keyword of BINGO. What does it say?
CIPHER.429.author: Jim Rohn

CIPHER.437.cipherString: Doubt can only be removed by action.
CIPHER.437.question: Your smart fridge started flashing this cryptic message at 3 a.m. It's by Johann Wolfgang von Goethe encoded in an Affine with a=5 and b=18. What does it say?
CIPHER.437.author: Johann Wolfgang von Goethe

CIPHER.435.cipherString: Science consists exactly of those forms of knowledge that can be verified and duplicated by anybody.
CIPHER.435.question: You receive an anonymous text message containing a coded passage. It's said to be a quote by Seth Lloyd, encrypted with a Caesar. What does it say?
CIPHER.435.author: Seth Lloyd

CIPHER.430.cipherString: One thing is certain in business. You and everyone around you will make mistakes.
CIPHER.430.question: Someone passed you a piece of paper with this Complete Columnar encoded quote by Richard Branson. The quote has AINI somewhere in it. What does it say?
CIPHER.430.author: Richard Branson

CIPHER.439.cipherString: True happiness is not found in people, places, or things. It is found in our own hearts.
CIPHER.439.question: Etched into the surface of a melted vinyl record, you found this Checkerboard-encrypted quote by Avijeet Das with a polybius key of NIGHTMARE. What does it say?
CIPHER.439.author: Avijeet Das

CIPHER.423.cipherString: He who cannot do as he would, must do as he can.
CIPHER.423.question: Your smartwatch notification contained an Italian Proverb in a Baconian cipher. What does it say?
CIPHER.423.author: Italian Proverb

CIPHER.417.cipherString: Neatness and cleanliness is not a function of how rich or poor you are but that of mentality and principle.
CIPHER.417.question: The message below was intercepted from an experimental satellite transmission. It contains a quote by Ikechukwu Izuakor, encoded as an Aristocrat using a K1 alphabet. What does it say?
CIPHER.417.author: Ikechukwu Izuakor

CIPHER.427.question: A mysterious postcard arrives from an unknown sender. It contains a coded quote, written in a Cryptarithm. What do the values 3811478 9538602 decode to?

CIPHER.434.cipherString: If you look at nature closely, you will notice miracles all around you.
CIPHER.434.question: During a field trip, you notice these strange markings on a metal plaque. They represent a quote by Shree Shambav, encoded using an Atbash Cipher. What does it say?
CIPHER.434.author: Shree Shambav

CIPHER.419.cipherString: A scientist said once that if the ocean were as clear as the sky, if we could see everything in it, no one would ever go in the sea.
CIPHER.419.question: Your chemistry lab's fume hood started beeping in Morse… but the real puzzle is this Patristocrat quote by Cassandra Clare using a K1 alphabet. You are told that the cipher starts with ASCI. What does it say?
CIPHER.419.author: Cassandra Clare

CIPHER.438.cipherString: The best form of government is that which is most likely to prevent the greatest sum of evil.
CIPHER.438.question: While debugging a program, you find this hidden in the comments. It's a quote by James Monroe, encrypted with a Checkerboard with a polybius key of TRIANGLE. What does it say?
CIPHER.438.author: James Monroe

CIPHER.431.cipherString: Fear of danger is ten thousand times more terrifying than danger itself.
CIPHER.431.question: An explorer's journal mentions a “hidden truth” encoded below. It turns out to be a quote by Daniel Defoe, written in a Complete Columnar Cipher. The quote has ORETERR somewhere in it. What does it say?
CIPHER.431.author: Daniel Defoe
